title: Grilled Eggplant with Caramelized Mediterranean Flatbread
description: A flavorful eggplant dish served with a side of caramelized flatbread, perfect for a Mediterranean-inspired lunch or dinner.
instructions: 2. Brush eggplant slices with olive oil and season with salt, pepper, and garlic.
3. Grill eggplant slices for 3-4 minutes per side, or until tender and slightly charred.
4. Meanwhile, toast flatbread slices until crispy and golden brown.
5. In a small bowl, whisk together lemon juice and feta cheese (if using).
6. Brush the toasted flatbread slices with the lemon-feta mixture and season with salt and pepper.
7. Serve the grilled eggplant slices with caramelized flatbread on the side.
